elements.text:
A friend tells a funny joke and you start to laugh really hard. While you're laughing, you feel an uncomfortable tightness in your chest that you've never felt before. 

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: This tightness is kind of scary, but I can enjoy laughing now and see if it still bothers me later.
That must have been a really funny joke.
I really don't like this feeling, but I can tolerate it.
I have never laughed that hard at a joke my friend has told.
